headline: 3 Top-Rated Stocks to Buy After Crushing EPS Expectations: LION, KEYS, ROST
summary: After their strong earnings reports this week, these top-rated stocks may still offer investors meaningful upside potential moving forward.

headline: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Is Down 6.6% After Record Q2 Results And Surging AI-Driven Revenue Growth
summary: In May 2026, Keysight Technologies reported record second-quarter and first-half results, with Q2 sales of US$1,717 million and net income of US$349 million, and issued third-quarter revenue guidance of US$1,730 million to US$1,750 million alongside continued momentum in AI, communications, aerospace, defense, and semiconductor testing. Keysight also announced that AI-related revenue for the first half of fiscal 2026 has already exceeded its full-year 2025 AI revenue, with AI now accounting...

headline: KEYS Q2 Earnings Beat on Communications, Industrial Segment Growth
summary: Keysight posts record fiscal Q2 revenues and orders as demand across AI data centers, semiconductors, wireless and defense fueled growth and a higher 2026 outlook.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Keysight Techs, Raises Price Target to $376
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Niknam   maintains Keysight Techs (NYSE:KEYS) with a Hold and raises the price target from $310 to $376.

headline: Why UnitedHealth (UNH) Remains a Turnaround Bet Despite Policy and Cost Pressure
summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is one of the best stocks to buy according to Goldman Sachs’ Conviction List. Goldman added UnitedHealth to its U.S. Conviction List on May 1, alongside Interactive Brokers, while removing Abbott Laboratories and Keysight Technologies. The firm said its conviction lists highlight stocks it views favorably for investment, and UnitedHealth’s inclusion […]
